cards.example: They plan to hire ten new engineers.
She submitted her resignation last Friday.
He received three months of severance pay.
Annual appraisals are held in December.
The probationary period lasts three months.
High turnover increases recruitment costs.
The onboarding process takes one week.
The company reduced its workforce by ten percent.
Employees are paid extra for overtime.
The factory announced layoffs due to low demand.
The headcount has grown to two hundred.
She received a promotion after two years.
Payroll is processed on the last Friday of the month.
Benefits include health insurance and a pension plan.
Sales incentives motivate the team to reach targets.
All staff must complete compliance training annually.
They outsource their IT support to a specialist firm.
The merger was completed in March.
The restructuring led to the closure of two offices.
The Paris subsidiary employs fifty people.
